photos.alt: Group photograph associated with Tynesoft staff; individual public identifications remain under verification
photos.title: Tynesoft staff group photograph
photos.caption: Tynesoft staff group photograph, caption attributed to Kevin Blake on Stairway to Hell. Blake says he believes he took the source photograph in 1987; individual labels remain provisional until independently corroborated.
photos.public_identification_status: Caption attributed to source; further corroboration pending.

photos.alt: Wide group photograph associated with Tynesoft staff; individual public identifications remain under verification
photos.title: Tynesoft staff group photograph
photos.caption: Second Tynesoft staff group photograph reproduced in Kevin Blake's Stairway to Hell article. The article names a few positions, but the site does not publish definitive face labels until the evidence threshold is met.
photos.public_identification_status: Partial caption attributed to source; further corroboration pending.
